title: OpenBudget Decennial Dataset Index
description: Schema for datasets.json stored in the main GitLab snippet. Maps decade ranges to their dedicated GitLab snippets and lists contained yearly datasets.

periodStart.description: First year of this decade period.

periodEnd.description: Last year of this decade period.

api.description: Full GitLab v4 API URL of the decade's dedicated snippet.

link.description: Human-readable URL to the decade snippet on the GitLab web interface.

datasets.description: List of individual yearly dataset entries contained in this decade's snippet.

link.description: Raw URL to the yearly file (e.g. vYYYY.json) inside the decade snippet.

lastUpdate.description: ISO 8601 date of the last update.

sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the vYYYY.json payload at the time of last upload. Used to skip re-uploading unchanged datasets.
